news.t: New BlackRock ETF Signals A Strong Focus On The Texas Economy
BlackRock Launches Texas ETF, Opens Greater Access to Invest in Growing Texas Economy

holdings.infoBox: TEXN is an equity ETF with a total of 193 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesla stock at 9.28%, Exxon Mobil at 8.56%, Caterpillar at 7.70%, Chevron at 6.02%, and Oracle at 5.77%.

overview.description: The iShares Texas Equity ETF (TEXN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell Texas Equity index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index that invests in equity securities of companies headquartered in Texas. The fund aims to capitalize on Texas business and population growth TEXN was launched on Jun 23, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
